publicCategoryInfoMsg: A general location is a shared space that any employee can use and is not tied to a specific person's profile.
employeeCategoryInfoMsg: An employee location refers to the physical workspace where an employee is stationed, such as a desk, office, room.
typeNameTooltip: Write a name that describes the location type
typeCodeTooltip: Write a code that will be used for this location type in location full code to refer to this location type
qrPrintingTooltip: Please select the QR code printing size dimensions for locations that will be linked to this location type
serviceTypeTooltip: select services would be available for this location type
unlinkConfirmMessageHeader: are you sure you want to proceed?
unlinkConfirmMessageBody: by confirming the unlinking the employee will be removed from this location and the location will be available for linking for other employees
deleteLocationTypeConfirmMessageBody: are you sure you want to proceed with deleting this location type?
locationAssignedSubTitleEmpty: When employees assign themselves to locations through their profiles, assigned locations will appear here.
assignedLocationsPlaceHolder: search by location code, employee email
duplicatedTypeCode: location type code must be unique across all location types.
duplicatedTypeName: location type name must be unique across all location types.
errorLimitMessage: please fix these 10 errors first and re-upload the sheet for further validation
whitespaceErrMsg: type code must contain only uppercase letters and numbers, no spaces or special character
locationAssignedSubTitleEmptyForSearch: no assigned locations matched the code, mail entered.
kindlyArchiveAllTheRelatedLocations: Kindly archive all the related locations to this location type first to be able to archive it.
archivingTheLocationTypeWillRemove: Archiving the location type will remove it from the available list of location types while creating new location and move it to archived location types.
archivelocationConfirmationMessage: After confirming the location archiving if an employee scanned the location QR code he won't be able to access any service related to this location and he will be informed that this location is not existing anymore.
archivelocationsConfirmationMessage: After confirming the locations archiving if an employee scanned any of the location QR codes he won't be able to access any service related to these locations and he will be informed that these locations are not existing anymore.
